overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a neon-drenched futuristic city. The player navigates from an open plaza under an elevated highway, through narrow streets lined with holographic billboards, to a crosswalk with moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza under elevated highway interchange

events.description: turning right at the intersection toward the main street
crossing the street between moving vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking through an open plaza and crossing the street while turning right toward the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with teal accent lighting
tall modern building with illuminated glass facade and neon signage
large holographic advertisement displaying a pink human figure
red and white striped construction barriers blocking off an area
overhead directional sign structure with illuminated text panels

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide urban plaza beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. The player turns right and crosses the asphalt street, passing concrete barriers and moving vehicles, while a glass office tower with neon signage dominates the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with automated vending machines

events.description: transitioning from open plaza to sidewalk lined with vending machines and street vendors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk passing by illuminated vending machines and food stalls

entered.detail: red automated food vending machine with glowing interface and product display
yellow vending machine with bright illuminated front panel
large digital billboard showing a face with 'CHILL FOOD' text visible

segments.scene_description: Moving along the commercial sidewalk, the scene features a line of parked cars on the left and colorful vending machines on the right. The elevated highway remains overhead as the player passes by a large digital food advertisement.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pedestrian corridor under elevated highway with dense holographic advertisements

events.description: entering narrow covered street beneath the elevated highway structure with dense neon signage
passing through dense cluster of holographic billboards and digital screens

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow neon-lit corridor surrounded by holographic advertisements and opposing pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue vest walking toward camera then passing by

entered.detail: large circular neon sign with pink and cyan concentric rings
wall of multiple stacked digital screens showing various advertisements
brutalist concrete building with small illuminated windows
vertical neon sign with three downward pointing arrows

segments.scene_description: The environment becomes enclosed as the player enters a narrow corridor under the highway, surrounded by dense neon signage including a prominent circular pink billboard. The space feels sheltered with wet concrete reflecting the colorful lights while pedestrians walk in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with yellow zebra crossing and waiting traffic

events.description: approaching intersection with bright yellow zebra crossing markings
stopping at crosswalk to wait for passing traffic

agents.ego_description: approaching the crosswalk and stopping at the curb to wait for vehicles to pass before crossing

notable_agents.action: yellow futuristic sports car with six wheels stopped at the intersection

entered.detail: bright yellow zebra crossing with bold black stripes and red 'WALK' text
multi-story concrete apartment block with grid-patterned windows
futuristic yellow sports car with six wheels and glowing headlights
blue neon hotel sign visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the narrow corridor into an open intersection featuring a prominent yellow crosswalk. Stopping at the curb, the scene shows a yellow futuristic sports car waiting at the intersection and a brutalist apartment building on the left, while the elevated highway structure recedes to the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide urban plaza into a claustrophobic neon corridor before emerging into a bright city intersection. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway overpass, crossing an asphalt street past concrete barriers and a towering glass office building adorned with neon signs. As the camera moves along the commercial sidewalk, the open space narrows, passing parked cars and colorful vending machines under the persistent shadow of the highway. The environment then shifts into a sheltered, narrow corridor where wet concrete reflects a dense array of neon signage and a prominent circular pink billboard. Finally, the camera emerges from the enclosure into an open intersection, stopping at a yellow crosswalk beside a futuristic sports car as the highway structure recedes toward a brutalist apartment building.
